articles.title: Guntur civic chief orders strict vigil against contamination of drinking water
articles.summary: Officials told to conduct special audit of drinking water pipelines near the drainage channels and ensure proper documentation of quality test results

articles.summaryEn: The civic chief of Guntur has ordered strict monitoring to prevent contamination of the city's drinking water.

articles.title: Centre Hikes MSP for Kharif Crops 2026-27, Andhra Minister K Atchannaidu Welcomes Move - Daily Pioneer

articles.titleTe: కేంద్రం ఖరిఫ్ కార్ప్స్ 2026-27 కోసం MSP పెంచుతుంది, ఆంధ్ర ప్రదేశ్ మంత్రి కే అచ్చన్నాయుడు స్వాగతిస్తున్నారు
articles.summaryEn: The center has increased the MSP for Kharif crops for 2026-27, which was welcomed by Andhra Minister K Atchannaidu.
